step3.title: Step 3: Pontus-X Access Policies
step3.description: Define governance rules and usage conditions for your dataset

permissions.heading: Permissions — What the user CAN do

prohibitions.heading: Prohibitions — What the user CANNOT do

termsUrl.label: Terms & Conditions Link (Optional)

accessControl.heading: Access Control (Pontus-X)
accessControl.whitelistHint: If you add organisations here, the asset becomes PRIVATE.
accessControl.blacklistHint: These organisations will not be able to view or request the asset.
